title: aquilegia vulgaris subsp. oxysepala
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. oxysepala, also known as the common columbine, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant contains alkaloids with potential medicinal properties, including antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. Consuming the plant may provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as acting as a natural sedative and antioxidant. Aquilegia vulgaris subsp. oxysepala can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to the plant's potential interactions with medications.
